prediction.reasoning: Based on UPS's historical volatility (approximately 1.8% daily standard deviation) and mean reversion tendencies typical of large-cap logistics stocks, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model with slight positive drift. The 6-day forecast incorporates expected volatility scaling with square root of time, assuming normal market conditions without major earnings or economic announcements. UPS typically shows moderate volatility compared to tech stocks, supporting these relatively narrow confidence intervals.
